title: Pranks for Kids, 14Pcs Prank Kit Practical Jokes Games for Adults, Gift Box for Men Friends Tricks, Funny Prank Gadgets For Kids, Adults, Friends, Family
features: 【14 Hilarious & Harmless Pranks in One Kit】Surprise your friends with 14 classic pranks like fake spilled drinks, creepy rubber bugs, and popping gum! All props made of non-toxic, durable materials—safe for kids and adults to enjoy endless laughs without real mess.

【Perfect for April Fools’ Day & Family Fun】From squirting pens to shocking handshake buzzers, this kit is designed for April Fools’ pranks, birthday surprises, or breaking the ice at parties. Lightweight and portable, easily stash it in a backpack for camping or school events.

【No Annoying Cleanup, Reusable Props】Unlike messy flour bombs, our pranks leave no stains. Fake spills use static-cling films, and rubber bugs can be reused. Includes step-by-step instructions for first-time pranksters.

【Gag Gifts That Build Connections】Ideal for teens, office colleagues, or secret Santa—spread joy without awkwardness. The compact box (20*20cm) makes it a stocking filler or white elephant gift. Adults love nostalgic pranks like exploding candy boxes.

【Spark Laughter & Bond with Loved Ones】Whether it’s pranking Dad at breakfast or giggling with siblings during family game nights, this kit turns ordinary moments into hilarious memories. Encourages creativity and social bonding – screen-free fun for ages 8+!
description: Product description 🎉 Unleash the Ultimate Fun with Our 14-in-1 Prank Kit! 🎉 Tired of boring game nights? Surprise your friends, family, or coworkers with this hilarious yet harmless prank set – the perfect way to spark laughter without the messy cleanup! Designed for ages 8 to 80, this kit combines classic gags with creative twists to turn any ordinary day into an unforgettable adventure. 🌟 Why Choose Our Prank Kit? ✅ 14 Unique Pranks in 1 Box: From "fake spilled coffee" stickers to jumping spider toys, every prop is handpicked for maximum giggles. ✅ Safe & Reusable: Made with non-toxic rubber, static-cling films, and washable materials – no stains, no regrets! ✅ Pocket-Sized Mischief: The compact box (20x20cm) fits in your backpack for pranking on-the-go – school, camping trips, or office prank wars! ✅ Instant Icebreaker: Comes with illustrated instructions (even a granny can master it in 5 minutes!). 🎯 Perfect For: April Fools’ Day – Become the mastermind of the year with realistic fake bugs and exploding candy boxes. Family Bonding – Watch kids and grandparents team up to prank unsuspecting uncles at Sunday roast dinners. Office Shenanigans – Replace the boss’s stapler with a squirting pen and lighten up Monday meetings. Stocking Fillers & Secret Santa – A gag gift that’s 10x funnier than another pair of socks. 🛠 What’s Inside? ✔ Fake Spill Set (Coffee, Milk, Ketchup) ✔ Creepy Rubber Spiders & Centipedes (3 Sizes) ✔ Popping Bubble Gum Surprise ✔ Handshake Shock Buzzers (Vibration Only – No Pain!) ✔ Invisible Ink Pen & Secret Message Pad ✔ Bonus: “Prank Master” Achievement Badge 💡 Pro Tips for Legendary Pranks: Timing is Everything – Drop a fake cockroach when Mum’s baking her famous pie. Keep a Straight Face – Stick the “spilled coffee” sticker on Dad’s laptop right before his call. Team Up – Get siblings to distract Grandma while you rig her chair with the whoopee cushion! Safety Warning NO
